description:
Baby Green Lapel Short Sleeve Romper Clover Print Button Detail Playsuit With Snap Closure

Dress your little one in charming style with our Baby Lapel Short Sleeve Romper, featuring a smart lapel collar and adorable clover print that symbolizes luck and happiness. This practical playsuit includes decorative button accents and convenient snap closures at the back and crotch for easy dressing and diaper changes. Perfect for spring and summer, the lightweight design and short sleeves keep your baby comfortable and cute during warm-weather outings, family gatherings, or playful days at home.

Crafted from 100% soft polyester, this romper offers durability, easy care, and gentle comfort against your baby's delicate skin. The breathable fabric ensures optimal comfort while maintaining its shape and vibrant colors through active play and repeated washing.

Highlighted Features:

  • Lucky Clover Print: Playful pattern adds a touch of whimsy and charm

  • Practical Snap Closures: Back and leg snaps make changing quick and hassle-free

  • Stylish Lapel Collar: Adds a smart, polished look to baby fashion

  • Comfortable Short Sleeves: Perfect for warm weather and active movement

  • Easy-Care Fabric: Machine washable and quick-drying for busy parents

Available in sizes: 3-6M, 6-9M, 9-12M, 12-18M. This romper combines functionality with adorable design, making it a go-to choice for your baby's spring and summer wardrobe.
